boosts.name: Static Filter
boosts.tagline: Two wrong answers, swallowed by the static.
boosts.rules: Twice per run: remove two wrong choices from the current question.

boosts.name: Second Wind
boosts.tagline: Every hour of the night deserves a second wind.
boosts.rules: The first wrong answer in each round costs no life.

boosts.name: Amplifier
boosts.tagline: Turn it up and let the streak sing.
boosts.rules: Streak bonus raised from 25 to 40 points per consecutive correct answer.

boosts.name: Signal Lock
boosts.tagline: A good signal bends before it breaks.
boosts.rules: A wrong answer halves your streak instead of resetting it.

boosts.name: Night Owl Rates
boosts.tagline: The hard stuff pays overtime after midnight.
boosts.rules: Difficulty 4 and 5 questions score 50 percent extra.

boosts.name: Double Broadcast
boosts.tagline: Both towers at full power. Do not miss.
boosts.rules: Next round only: double points, but wrong answers cost 2 lives.

boosts.name: Deep Cuts
boosts.tagline: B-sides and rarities, straight from the vault.
boosts.rules: Next round only: harder questions, worth 75 percent extra points.

boosts.name: Spare Fuse
boosts.tagline: Hear that hum? The transmitter is back.
boosts.rules: Gain a life right now. Already at full lives: 250 points instead.

boosts.name: Transmitter Tune-up
boosts.tagline: She purrs now. You did that.
boosts.rules: Bonus life every 2nd completed round instead of every 3rd.
